extraction_notes: options field contains only choice labels, not textual option content

image_dependency: question text explicitly refers to 'The diagram' and asks which part was cut from the grid
the task depends on visual shape/grid structure rather than text alone
multi_step: solving likely requires locating the missing/cut region in the grid and matching it to one of the options
this implies at least visual decomposition plus comparison against 5 choices
however, exact complexity is uncertain because the image content itself is not inspected here
verifiability: answer_type is option/choice with a single gold answer 'E'
choices are explicitly enumerated as A-E
final-answer checking is straightforward by exact option match, even though reasoning is image-based
